items.title: Implementation Decisions: Replit's Approach vs. Technical Requirements
items.author: Sebastian Schürmann
items.content:
In a recent blog post titled "I Was So Angry, I Built My Own", I articulated the frustrations that often drive developers to build bespoke solutions. The article hints the creation of a project management tool designed to address shortcomings found in existing commercial offerings. While the ingenuity and comprehensive feature set of the described solution are commendable, particularly its embrace of modern development paradigms, it also raises pertinent questions regarding architectural complexity and the optimal distribution of responsibilities within a system. This follow-up looks into the implementation decisions discussed in the original post, contrasting them with an eye towards technical requirements and the overarching goal of complexity reduction. We will specifically examine the implications of certain design choices, such as the handling of versioning and the calculation of weighted backlogs, and foreshadow an alternative approach leveraging the robust capabilities of another way to architect this problem.

My original blog post points out several aspects of the custom-built project management tool that I believe align with modern development expectations. I noted that "replit did a lot of things right, in terms of what is expected from modern development." This refers to features such as markdown-based content, a nuanced relative weight system for prioritization, first-class documentation (ADRs, Post-Mortems), integrated DORA metrics, and Kanban boards with built-in metrics. These features collectively contribute to what I aimed to be a sophisticated and highly functional system.

However, the codebase I received pointed to a significant concern: the complexity of my requirements, specifically mentioning "db, orm, migrations." This complexity is particularly evident in how versioning is handled. As I stated, "deserializing JSON and comparing it against old versions is hard to write application code." This implies that my system stores historical versions of data, possibly as JSON blobs within the database, and relies on application-level logic to extract, parse, and compare these versions. While flexible, this approach can indeed introduce several challenges:

  • Performance Overhead: Deserializing large JSON objects and performing deep comparisons can be computationally intensive, especially as the volume of historical data grows. this actually makes the only part of the application slow that should not be.
  • Developer Burden: Developers are tasked with writing and maintaining complex application code for version comparison, diffing, and merging, which can be error-prone and time-consuming.
  • Data Integrity: Ensuring the consistency and validity of JSON data across different versions requires careful validation logic within the application.
  • Querying Limitations: Querying historical data or performing analytics on past states can be difficult and inefficient when data is stored as opaque JSON blobs, often requiring application-level processing after retrieval.

The whole, modern, Monthy was present: Database Migration Scripts, ORM Code from Drizzle, well defined fields and application code to calculate it. Everything easy to mock as modern frameworks provide all the bells and whistles.

My current schema provides a robust framework for the application, the extensive use of jsonb for core data and versioning, coupled with the ORM, shifts significant data processing and management responsibilities to the application layer. This design, while flexible, introduces the very complexity I aim to mitigate, particularly for operations like version comparison and complex data calculations (e.g., weighted backlog).

  1. Historical data must be a first class citizen (e.g. I need to be able to gather the data for a Cumulative flow diagram with a query only)
  2. To many test doubles: database smoke test, orm config, migrations for incremental changes and a quite overblown architecture with rather extensive Rest API
  3. The Database can be decomposed better. I went to Story, Estimates, Status as their own tables with historical data
  4. Performance is not my concern. I can freely use triggers etc. I am not designing for an audience, but only my use case.

Another Approach: Do it in the Database!

Using "Postgres with triggers and stored procedures for common usecases" is alternative to my current architecture, particularly for addressing the complexities of versioning and data calculations. This approach advocates for pushing more business logic and data manipulation into the database layer, leveraging PostgreSQL's powerful native capabilities. My core idea is to reduce the "many different elements that have to work together to do simple things as calculating a number," thereby simplifying the overall system and reducing the learning curve for additional tools.

Instead of storing entire JSON blobs in a versions table and relying on application-level deserialization and comparison, a pure PostgreSQL approach could manage versioning more natively. PostgreSQL offers several features that can be leveraged:

  • Triggers: Triggers can automatically capture changes to specific tables (e.g., stories, adrs). When a row is updated, a BEFORE UPDATE or AFTER UPDATE trigger can record the old and new values of relevant columns into a dedicated history table. This eliminates the need for the application to explicitly manage version creation.
  • Row-level Change Tracking: Instead of storing full JSON documents, history tables can store only the changed fields, along with metadata like the timestamp of the change and the user who made it. This reduces storage overhead and makes querying specific changes much more efficient.
  • Temporal Tables (via Extensions or Manual Implementation): While not native in the same way as some other databases, PostgreSQL can implement temporal table-like functionality using triggers and history tables. This allows querying data as it existed at a specific point in time, without complex application-level logic

I also found complexity of calculating a "weighted backlog" and searched for a way that such calculations could be done "much earlier." By leveraging PostgreSQL's capabilities, these calculations can be performed directly within the database, in one query, reducing the need for complex application-level logic

Given what modern development suggests: Replit gave a valid solution, that if it had came with a lot let 'wrestling with the AI', would have far exceeded what I'd expect a Developer to deliver. And this is exactly the problem. The approach creates and avalanche of dependencies and maintenance tasks. I would think, the code even follows clean code principles to a certain standard and dependencies can be easily mocked. But I ask myself: Why should I even. The avalanche effect can go both ways: finding something that expresses the complexity of the task at hand in a much more elegant way, with much less elements that I need to know about, has clear implications for the design of the application down the line.

Next Step: Build a well done Postgres Database test it and then feed it back to replit. A cumbersome, manual and exact process - Reality nuked expectations I guess - but nevertheless,

I don't wonder the LLM/Agent created this code. It is trained on the things that are upvoted in Stack Overflow and other places. However: Last years have been preachy and full of gatekeepers. So we see certain viewpoints drastically over amplified and taken at face value. My wish to future Agentic Development tools as well as to developers: Maybe think a little more and do less of that 'copy paste from upvoted stack overflow' or hype driven development but come up with more 'novel solutions' in the process. Our Brains will thank us along the way

items.title: Why Translating Documents with AI Tools Is Now Better Than Ever (2025 Update)
items.author: Shruti Saraswat
items.content:
In 2025, translating documents isn’t just faster — it’s smarter, cleaner, and layout-perfect. From scanned PDFs and subtitles to Excel-heavy reports and legal files, the way we process multilingual content has completely evolved thanks to AI.

Whether you're managing contracts across languages, handling international business paperwork, or localizing academic content, AI tools have made it possible to translate documents while preserving formatting, structure, and intent — something earlier methods consistently failed at.

Why Traditional Document Translation Falls Short

Manually translating files often creates friction:

  • Tables and layouts get broken during the process
  • Scanned documents require extra steps like OCR
  • Translation consistency is hard to maintain across long documents
  • Simple tools like Google Translate don't retain fonts, bullet points, or header formatting

This becomes a bigger problem when dealing with sensitive content like certificates, research papers, receipts, or legal PDFs that must retain their original formatting and visual integrity.

AI Tools Are Now the Standard for Multi-Language Document Handling

The new wave of AI-first document translators can:

  1. Accurately detect language from non-editable file types
  2. Process scanned receipts, handwritten forms, or printed PDFs using OCR
  3. Translate across 130+ languages while retaining document structure
  4. Deliver output that is format-preserved and submission-ready

Unlike older generation tools, these solutions don’t treat your document like plain text — they translate it in-context, layout-aware, and format-sensitive.

Tools I Rely On (and Why They Work)

After experimenting with many platforms, I now primarily use:

This platform handles multi-language document translation with OCR and formatting retention built-in. It works well for scanned files, subtitle files (SRT/VTT), Excel-heavy documents, and even multilingual PDFs. The tool also supports bulk translation use cases, especially for business users.

If you’re handling scanned legal papers or tabular data in Excel — this one preserves structure surprisingly well.

Or... (Honestly I found both of them similar in working, so you can use either in my opinion.)

Another fast, layout-accurate solution for translating documents like academic reports, HR paperwork, and invoices. It supports all common file formats and retains headers, fonts, and page structure, making it ideal for anyone working across departments or geographies.

Especially useful when you need to translate PDF documents into English, French or other languages without losing visual design or formatting.

Microsoft Translator (via Word and Excel)

For editable documents, Microsoft’s native translator lets you convert content within the Office environment. It’s quick and clean for shorter text-based files, but doesn’t offer OCR support for scanned files or complex formatting preservation.

How I Translate Complex Files in 2025

  1. Upload a scanned file or DOCX/PDF with mixed content 2.
  2. Use TranslatesDocument if the file includes tables, forms, or scanned sections or working with academic o& multilingual PDF files. Also, Doc Translator Online works pretty well.
  3. For editable DOCX or XLSX files, open in Word/Excel and use Microsoft Translator
  4. Export, review, and finalize — all in under 4-5 minutes per document (however, it depends on your document size)

This method is both repeatable and layout-safe — perfect for scenarios like translating legal agreements into French, or converting multilingual subtitles to English with timecodes intact.

What Makes These Tools Work in 2025?

Modern document translators use:

  • AI-powered contextual translation engines
  • Smart layout-aware rendering, especially for PDFs, SRTs, or Excel sheets
  • Optical Character Recognition to convert scanned documents into editable, translatable text
  • Language detection combined with native document formatting

The result? Files that look almost identical to the original — just in another language.

Use Cases Where AI Tools Excel

  • Translating scanned business contracts into Spanish
  • Converting PDFs from German to English for visa processing and a lot more
  • Handling Excel-based reports that require translation into multiple languages
  • Localizing subtitle files while preserving time codes and speaker labels

...these tools now handle all of that — automatically and securely.

What used to take hours, multiple tools, or manual effort — is now done within minutes using . With OCR, context-awareness, and visual formatting fidelity built into the process, translating documents in 2025 is no longer a bottleneck.

If you haven’t tried it yet, workflows like mine — powered by Doc Translator Online, TranslatesDocument, and built-in tools like Microsoft Translator — are worth integrating.

You’ll not only translate your documents more accurately, but also save countless hours — with zero compromise on format, tone, or structure.

Would you like a follow-up article on:

  • Subtitle translation tools?
  • Handling scanned documents from mobile phones?
  • Building your own AI-powered document translation stack?

Let me know in the comments 👇

items.title: 🧠 Automating My Day Like a Boss: My AI Assistant Setup with Runner H 🚀 Overview For the Runner H “AI Agent Prompting” Challenge, I wanted to create something powerful but practical — something that genuinely helps me manage my day as a busy student.
items.author: Harry Henshaw

items.title: 🧠 Automating My Day Like a Boss: My AI Assistant Setup with Runner H
items.author: Harry Henshaw
items.content:
🧠 Automating My Day Like a Boss: My AI Assistant Setup with Runner H 🚀 Overview

For the Runner H “AI Agent Prompting” Challenge, I wanted to create something powerful but practical — something that genuinely helps me manage my day as a busy student. I built a personal productivity assistant with Runner H that scans my email, calendar, and school dashboard each morning and sends me a full breakdown of what I need to do. No more surprises, no missed homework. Just pure focus.

This is the kind of assistant I always wished I had — and now I do.

🎯 What My Runner H Agent Does Every weekday at 7:30am, Runner H:

Checks my email, school dashboard, and calendar for:

Events or schedule changes

Prioritises tasks using the Eisenhower Matrix: – Urgent & Important

– Important but Not Urgent

– Urgent but Not Important

Creates a Daily Focus Document (Google Doc) with:

📋 Notes (summarised from long messages/emails)

Posts a short summary in Discord:

Calm, focused tone like a productivity coach

🧪 How I Built It No code needed — just Runner H and smart prompting. Here's my main prompt:

“Act as my personal executive assistant. Every morning at 7:30am, scan my inbox, school dashboard, and calendar. Collect homework deadlines, upcoming tests, events, and urgent messages. Organise them using the Eisenhower Matrix. Create a daily focus doc in Google Docs with Top Priorities, Quick Wins, Reminders, and Notes (summarised from long messages). Then, post a short 3-sentence summary in Discord with the top task and any urgent alerts. Use a calm, focused tone.”

I added test data to simulate deadlines and announcements. It worked beautifully. The daily document was clean and helpful, and the Discord message gave me just the right nudge to start my day.

💡 Why This Matters This project helps students (and honestly, anyone) reduce overwhelm. Instead of checking 4 different places, I get a simple, well-organised plan. It saves time, reduces stress, and builds good habits. This is just one example of how AI agents like Runner H can improve productivity and mental wellbeing.

🔧 Test It Yourself You can recreate this with:

A calendar with events or assignments

Google Docs connected in Runner H

A Discord webhook URL Just paste in the prompt above, connect your services, and set the time to run daily at 7:30am.

📢 Community Sharing I’ve shared this idea here to help other students and productivity fans. If you like it, feel free to remix the prompt with your own style — maybe a coach, a gamer, or even a chill monk version!

Follow @hcompany_ai for updates and let’s push the future of work forward. 💼⚡

🏆 Why I Think This Could Win Uses real tools students already use

Follows a proven task management method (Eisenhower Matrix)

Simple but powerful routine — not just flashy, but useful

Clear documentation, easy to replicate

Adds a human touch with a calming tone

Thanks for reading — and good luck to everyone in the challenge! Let’s build the future. 🧠⚙️

items.title: Opportunity to Collaborate with The Met: Web Developer Needed to Build a World-Class Art Engagement Platform
items.author: Max Hollein
items.content:
Posted by: Max Hollein, CEO – The Metropolitan Museum of Art

At The Met, we believe that art is a bridge between civilizations, a voice of human experience, and a lens into our shared heritage. As we continue our mission of making art more accessible and relevant to all, we are seeking an exceptional web developer or development team to collaborate with us on a digital platform that will elevate how users engage with our services.

We are in the early stages of developing an interactive Art Engagement Platform—a sleek, intuitive, and secure digital space where global users and clients can:

Access curated art services

Explore bespoke cultural offerings

Connect with experts, events, and resources

Manage personalized interactions with The Met’s digital presence

This platform will reflect the excellence and legacy of The Met while integrating modern UX/UI standards and responsive web architecture.

We are open to working with a freelance developer, boutique agency, or development partner who meets the following criteria:

Proven experience in building high-end, scalable web platforms

Strong front-end & back-end development skills (React, Next.js, Node.js, etc.)

Understanding of secure authentication and user data handling

UI/UX design proficiency or access to a designer

Experience working with prestigious institutions or cultural organizations is a plus

Fully functional responsive web platform

Secure admin panel for internal content management

Client login/dashboard with tailored content views

Integration of booking/contact/communication features

Optimized performance for global reach

We are targeting a 3–4 month delivery window, with phased rollout potential.

We are open to negotiating a competitive and mutually beneficial deal. The scope of the project justifies a serious, skilled partnership, and we are prepared to compensate accordingly for quality and reliability. This could include:

Flat-rate project fee (based on scope)

Retainer or milestone-based model

Long-term collaboration for ongoing support/expansion

If this opportunity speaks to your expertise, we’d love to hear from you. Please submit:

A brief proposal or cover letter

Examples of relevant projects or portfolios

Your availability and preliminary rate expectations

This project is not just about building a website—it’s about shaping the future of how people experience and connect with art through The Met. Let’s create something remarkable together.

items.title: Boutique Spotlight: Best Plus Size Boutiques Worth Visiting in 2025
items.author: arav deshmukh
items.content:
The scene in 2025 is thriving more than ever, with a growing number of stores dedicated to stylish, curve-friendly fashion for every occasion. These boutiques have raised the bar, blending perfect fit, comfort, and trend-forward design to serve plus-size shoppers with exceptional style and care. From exclusive independent shops to well-known retail giants, this boutique spotlight highlights the top plus size boutiques worth visiting across the U.S.

In this guide, you’ll find expertly curated picks that champion size inclusivity, sustainability, and customer-focused shopping experiences, making plus-size fashion more accessible and inspiring than ever.

Top Plus Size Boutiques to Watch in 2025

Eloquii remains a trailblazer in the plus size fashion space. Catering to sizes up to 28, this boutique offers a fresh and trendy selection of dresses, chic workwear, denim, and even bridal styles. Known for consistent fit and quality, Eloquii regularly updates its collections, providing both statement pieces and wardrobe essentials that resonate with plus size shoppers and stylists alike.

From seasonal must-haves to classic basics, Eloquii is a reliable destination for anyone looking to embrace bold, fashionable curves without compromise.

Universal Standard sets itself apart with radical size inclusivity, offering every style in sizes ranging from 00 to 40. Their innovative Fit Liberty program allows customers to exchange items for a different size up to a year after purchase, effectively removing the stress from shopping.

Known for high-quality denim, elevated basics, and professional wear, Universal Standard has earned its place as a trusted name among that focus on fit, durability, and customer satisfaction.

If whimsical, boho-chic styles are your vibe, Anthropologie is a plus size boutique to explore. They offer a rich online selection of over 600 plus size options up to 26W. While their in-store stock may be limited, the online range makes up for it.

Anthropologie’s Nuuly rental service is a standout feature, letting shoppers experiment with new looks without commitment. It's a favorite for special occasions, unique prints, and feminine silhouettes that stand out in any crowd.

Founded by designer Cynthia Vincent, BAACAL brings luxury and sustainability to the forefront of plus size fashion. Catering to sizes 10 to 28, BAACAL’s curated collection includes beautifully crafted kaftans, dresses, and jackets that blend elegance with effortless style.

Perfect for shoppers seeking investment pieces that transcend seasonal trends, BAACAL is a boutique that understands the importance of long-lasting, sustainable fashion.

Chic Soul is a dedicated plus size boutique designed for fashion-forward shoppers who want curve-flattering, trend-conscious pieces. They offer free shipping on orders over $100 and prioritize customer service and quality.

This boutique is an excellent choice for those who want to stay on trend while enjoying comfort and confidence in their wardrobe.

Known for bold, vibrant designs, Tamara Malas caters to sizes up to 36 and boasts a boutique in NYC’s Lower East Side. Their standout matching sets and playful silhouettes make it the go-to place for individuals who want to make a splash and express their personality through fashion.

If you’re after statement-making looks that celebrate individuality, Tamara Malas is a must-visit.

Nooworks stands out for its artist-designed prints and commitment to sustainable fabrics and ethical production. Available in sizes XXS to 5X, Nooworks appeals to shoppers seeking colorful, unique styles that support independent artists and eco-conscious practices.

This boutique represents the best in that combine style with social responsibility.

City Chic is known for delivering on-trend fashion designed to boost confidence for plus size women. Their collection ranges from dresses and lingerie to shoes, with a strong focus on fit and style.

Whether you need everyday essentials or standout pieces for special events, City Chic provides reliable and fashionable options.

Department Store Favorites

Major department stores like Macy’s, Nordstrom, Dillard’s, and Belk have expanded their plus size selections significantly. They now feature dedicated sections with brands such as Crown & Ivy and CeCe, offering a wide range of styles and sizes under one roof.

These stores are convenient stops for shoppers who want classic styles, special occasion wear, and a broad size range without sacrificing quality.

For shoppers seeking a personalized experience, Laws of Motion uses AI technology to tailor-make clothing for any body shape or size. Their “Find My Fit” tool guarantees a perfect fit, making this boutique ideal for those who struggle with off-the-rack sizing or want special occasion pieces with guaranteed comfort.

This boutique is a game-changer, merging innovation with bespoke fashion.

Key Trends Shaping Plus Size Boutiques in 2025

Personalization and fit have taken center stage this year. Many boutiques now leverage AI-driven tools and custom tailoring to cater specifically to plus size shoppers. This technology enables more precise fits and stress-free shopping experiences, transforming how curve models and plus size customers shop.

Sustainability is also a significant trend. Boutiques like BAACAL and Nooworks lead by example, prioritizing ethical production, eco-friendly fabrics, and supporting local artisans. These efforts align perfectly with the growing consumer demand for responsible fashion choices.

Beyond being mere shopping destinations, many plus size boutiques have evolved into welcoming community spaces that champion body positivity and inclusivity. These boutiques offer more than just clothing — they provide a sense of belonging and empowerment for shoppers.

Incorporating technology with fashion, platforms like are enhancing the shopping experience by generating personalized outfit inspirations tailored to individual body types and preferences. This complements the experience by helping shoppers visualize looks that fit and flatter, even before buying.

→ Discover more fashion inspirations at Glance

Why Visiting a Plus Size Boutique Matters

Shopping at a dedicated plus size boutique is more than just buying clothes — it’s about discovering styles that celebrate curves and empower self-expression. These boutiques understand the importance of fit, fabric choice, and the confidence that comes with wearing clothing designed specifically for your body.

Plus size boutiques excel in delivering personalized customer service, from knowledgeable staff to tailored fittings and flexible return policies. This high level of attention creates a welcoming atmosphere where every shopper feels valued.

Moreover, these boutiques play a crucial role in pushing the fashion industry toward greater inclusivity. Supporting these stores helps fuel a movement demanding better representation, innovative design, and sustainable practices within fashion.

Final Thoughts: The Best Plus Size Boutiques Are Just a Visit Away

The landscape of plus size boutiques in 2025 offers a rich variety of options to suit every style and budget. From trendsetting independent shops like Tamara Malas and Nooworks to established favorites such as Eloquii and Universal Standard, plus size fashion has never been more vibrant and accessible.

Whether you seek everyday essentials, statement pieces, or custom-made garments, these boutiques deliver style, fit, and confidence without compromise. Their dedication to quality, sustainability, and customer care sets a new retail standard.

Additionally, the integration of AI-powered tools like Glance AI into the shopping experience further enhances personalization and accessibility, helping shoppers imagine and create looks that truly resonate with their unique style and body shape.

Visiting a plus size boutique in 2025 means stepping into a world where fashion embraces diversity, creativity thrives, and every curve is celebrated.

If you want to dive deeper into plus size fashion inspiration enhanced by technology, check out Glance to experience AI-driven outfit creativity that personalizes style to your body type and lifestyle.

items.title: Tips to Ace the AWS DevOps Certification Exam the First Time
items.author: vishal more
items.content:
If you're planning to build or validate your expertise in cloud DevOps, the AWS Certified DevOps Engineer – Professional certification is one of the most respected and challenging credentials in the industry. Designed for professionals with experience in provisioning, operating, and managing AWS environments, this certification demonstrates your ability to automate infrastructure, implement continuous delivery, and ensure high availability of systems. Cracking this exam on the first attempt is entirely possible—with the right strategy, preparation, and mindset. Here are the top tips to help you succeed.

Read more: Tips to Ace the AWS DevOps Certification Exam the First Time

  1. Understand the Exam Blueprint Thoroughly

Start by familiarizing yourself with the AWS exam guide. It breaks down the six domains covered in the exam:

Configuration Management and Infrastructure as Code

Policies and Standards Automation

Incident and Event Response

High Availability, Fault Tolerance, and Disaster Recovery

Understanding what each domain entails helps you prioritize your study plan based on weightage.

This certification is not theoretical—real-world experience is crucial. You should have at least 2 years of hands-on experience with AWS services such as:

AWS CodePipeline, CodeDeploy, CodeBuild

CloudFormation, Terraform (optional but helpful)

CloudWatch, X-Ray, and CloudTrail

EC2, ECS, Lambda, and Auto Scaling

IAM, KMS, and security best practices

If you’re missing experience in any of these, create practice projects in a free-tier AWS account to get comfortable.

  1. Use High-Quality Learning Resources

Invest in reliable and up-to-date resources, such as:

AWS Training & Certification official courses

Stephane Maarek’s DevOps Professional course on Udemy

Tutorials Dojo practice tests for realistic exam scenarios

These materials often mirror the style and complexity of actual questions.

  1. Master Infrastructure as Code (IaC)

Infrastructure as Code is a major focus in the exam. You must understand:

How to create and manage CloudFormation templates

Best practices for modularization, parameterization, and change sets

Automating infrastructure deployment using IaC tools

Being confident in this area can significantly boost your score.

  1. Embrace DevOps Principles

The exam evaluates your understanding of DevOps culture just as much as AWS services. Ensure you're familiar with:

CI/CD pipelines and deployment strategies (blue/green, canary)

Monitoring and observability

Feedback loops and automation

Compliance and security automation

Use case studies or whitepapers from AWS to understand how these principles are applied in real AWS environments.

  1. Practice with Timed Mock Exams

Taking full-length practice exams under timed conditions is essential. It helps:

Improve your time management

Reduce anxiety during the actual exam

Aim for at least 75-80% consistently before scheduling the real exam.

  1. Review AWS Whitepapers and FAQs

AWS whitepapers such as the Well-Architected Framework and the Security Best Practices are often referenced indirectly in the exam. Also, study FAQs of key services, as they contain insights not always found in documentation or courses.

  1. Use the AWS Free Tier for Practice

Hands-on experimentation is best done in the AWS Free Tier. Set up CI/CD pipelines, deploy sample applications, and simulate real-world workflows. This helps reinforce theoretical knowledge with practical understanding.

Participating in AWS communities, forums, and study groups (like on Reddit, Discord, or LinkedIn) allows you to:

Learn from others' experiences

Stay motivated through accountability

Others may even share recent exam trends and question styles.

  1. Stay Calm and Confident on Exam Day

Arrive early or prepare your system if taking it online

Read each question carefully—look for keywords and qualifiers like "most cost-effective" or "high availability"

If unsure of an answer, mark it for review and move on—don’t let one question eat into your time.

The AWS DevOps Engineer – Professional exam is challenging, but absolutely conquerable with the right preparation. Focus on concepts over rote learning, build real-world experience, and regularly test yourself with practice exams. With persistence and strategy, passing on your first attempt is well within reach.

Good luck with your certification journey—and welcome to the elite league of certified AWS DevOps Engineers!

items.title: Heroku’s 6-Hour Outage Actually Helped Our Company
items.author: Charan Achari
items.content:
When Heroku went down for 6 hours, we didn’t panic, at first.

We assumed it would be back soon.

But then an hour passed. Then two.

Deploys stopped working. The logs were gone. Even the dashboard was down.

We had a bug in production that needed fixing, and we were stuck watching the clock.

It was frustrating, but also eye-opening.

We’d been using Heroku for years. It was simple, fast, and reliable (most of the time).

But somewhere along the way, we stopped thinking about what would happen if it failed.

This outage made us realise:

We had no real backup plan.Everything depended on one platform, and that platform had just disappeared for an entire workday.

Now here’s where things changed.

We had casually checked out a tool called Kuberns a few weeks earlier.

Didn’t switch to it. Just bookmarked it as “something worth exploring later.”

But when Heroku went down, we gave it a shot.

We weren’t expecting magic; we just wanted something that worked.

  • We got our backend deployed to AWS within 20 minutes
  • We didn’t need to write scripts or configure pipelines
  • Most importantly, we could what was happening during the deploy

It felt like we were back in control.

Heroku’s outage wasn’t a disaster for us.

In fact, it gave us the push we needed to rethink how we deploy apps.

We didn’t leave Heroku immediately, but we stopped putting all our trust in it.

Today, we deploy across multiple systems. Heroku is still in the mix, but Kuberns has taken on a bigger role and we’re better off for it.

Sometimes the thing that breaks your workflow is the thing that improves it the most.

That 6-hour outage forced us to re-evaluate, clean up our infrastructure habits, and find tools that give us visibility simplicity.

Honestly, glad it happened.

items.title: Can AI Design The Perfect Game?
items.author: Salman
items.content:
As technology continues to evolve, the integration of artificial intelligence is so rapid that one could get lost trying to keep up 😂. Many industries have already felt the impact of this groundbreaking technology and for the gaming industry, it’s revolutionizing the way games are developed, designed and played. However, its integration into the gaming industry raises a question that has been asked by quite a lot of people and it is “Can AI Design the Perfect Game?”. This question is quite complex because perfection varies from person to person. For me a perfect game is a combination of stunning graphics, amazing storytelling and smooth gameplay.

AI’s potential in game development is really vast as it has the ability to analyze massive datasets from existing games. So by doing this, it can identify patterns in player preferences and behaviours which allows it to create games that cater precisely to what players want. Also, it can identify trends and other factors which enable it to create designs that resonate with different audiences.

Now imagine an AI capable of generating unique game worlds, characters, etc, that’s mind-blowing isn’t 🤯. Well with procedural content generation, that’s possible as artificial intelligence can generate game worlds that provide unique gaming experiences that keep players engaged. Furthermore, AI can adapt the gameplay mechanics based on how well the players are doing and the feedback received from them. This personalized approach changes the way player play games and adjusts the difficulty levels to match the individuals skills or style of play leading to a more immersive gaming experience.

Creating high- quality assets for games, whether it’s animation, graphics or sounds can be time consuming and very expensive. However AI powered tools are transforming this process using tools such as DALL-E to generate artistic concepts, automating tasks like facial animations and motion in minutes thereby accelerating the design process. AI can also generate sounds, music and even voiceovers for characters.

Now the things I mentioned above are all good and wonderful but then when developing games using AI there are some challenges to consider one of them being whether it can replicate the creativity and emotional depth that human developers bring to storytelling which is a really critical component in developing games. Yeah it can generate impressive stories and narrative but it still struggles to match and capture the complexity of human experiences and emotions that players resonate with.

Personally what I feel is that instead of allowing AI to do all the work, human developers should collaborate with these AI system. So by combining human intuition with the analytical capabilities of artificial intelligence, I think we can create wonderful, amazing and perfect games.

So basically, I don’t think artificial intelligence can create the perfect game (I mean my own definition of perfect game 🙃) yet but what do you think. Let me know in the comments below😁

items.title: The Largest Challenges Artificial Intelligence Developers Face
items.author: Kamini Bisht
items.content:
The Complex Reality of AI Creation Life as an AI developer is not one of eureka moments and breakthroughs that changed the game. It is messy, and each successful use of AI has a tangled web of issues that the artificial intelligence developer must solve on a daily basis. These issues have a tendency to kill or make a project and turn it into another story of misery in the quick world of AI. Data Quality: The Foundation Problem

Each artificial intelligence creator understands that data is the blood of AI systems, but obtaining top-notch, representative datasets is one of the most nagging issues. Low-quality data doesn't only hinder development,it can absolutely kill projects. Biased datasets produce biased AI systems, while incomplete or incorrect data creates models that blow up in real-world applications.

The problem is greater than simply collecting data. Artificial intelligence developers must ensure that the datasets are representative, diverse, and ethically obtained. That typically takes months of data cleaning, validating, and enriching before model development even occurs. It's exhausting work, but absolutely worth it in creating AI systems that act consistently well across scenarios and populations.Computational Resource Constraints Today's AI algorithms are computationally intensive beasts. To train a single large language model costs hundreds of thousands of dollars worth of computer resources, which makes cutting-edge AI development out of reach for many organizations. This is a significant barrier for artificial intelligence developers without access to large cloud computing budgets or dedicated hardware.

The problem isn't just a matter of cost,it's access too. High-end GPUs and specialized AI chips are scarce, making it challenging to meet project deadlines. Artificial intelligence developers are optimization wizards, having to find creative solutions to accomplish tasks with minimal hardware while maintaining model performance.

The Explainability Dilemma

Since complex AI models are hard to understand in terms of what drives their decision-making, their "black box" character poses severe challenges to artificial intelligence developers when designing applications for healthcare, finance, or other regulated industries where explainability is critical.

Regulators and stakeholders call for openness, but some of the most influential AI methods,deep learning models, say,are doing things that are tricky to describe. Model precision needs to be traded off against explainability by which artificial intelligence designers have a direct impact.

The technology for AI evolves at breakneck speed. New best practices, frameworks, and algorithms are invented every now and then, so keeping the artificial intelligence developers current is challenging. Something that is cutting-edge today may become outdated in six months' time, and this puts pressure on learning and updating constantly.

This quick evolution also raises compatibility problems. Libraries become obsolete, APIs evolve, and development environments transform. AI developers have to support current systems while at the same time gearing up for upcoming evolution, with the sensation of constructing on moving sand.Ethical Considerations and Bias Artificial intelligence designers today bear an enormous responsibility. Their creations can influence millions of individuals, so moral considerations must be brought to the forefront. Locating and combating bias in AI technologies requires an awareness and watching for how different groups might be affected by decision-making algorithms.

The challenge isn't technical,it's a philosophical one. AI builders must struggle with questions of justice, privacy, and the broader ramifications of what they're creating. These are challenges that may require collaboration with ethicists, social scientists, and community members, thereby increasing the complexity of the development process.

Integration and Deployment Challenges Developing an AI model is the easy part. Integrating AI systems with established infrastructure is a problem that is more complex than most programmers realize. Legacy systems were not built to be integrated with AI modules, and this creates issues of compatibility as well as performance bottlenecks.

Deployment also has its own set of problems. AI models that excel in development stages will come up short when they encounter actual world distributions of data.

artificial intelligence developers must construct robust monitoring and maintenance systems so that their models continue to function properly as time moves forward. Despite these challenges, artificial intelligence development remains to grow rapidly. Winning requires technical ability, imagination, and a sensitivity to the broader implications of AI technology. For artificial intelligence developers willing to embrace these challenges, individual and social rewards can be huge.

items.title: Virtual Friendships
items.author: Tyler Barera
items.content:
Virtual friendships have become a significant part of modern life, not just because they're convenient, but because they're meaningful. In a world where time zones, schedules, and geography get in the way of traditional friendships, meeting someone online feels less like an alternative and more like the new normal. These connections form naturally—sometimes unexpectedly and grow through shared interests, consistent communication, and genuine emotional support.

There's something freeing about digital friendships. They strip away a lot of the social expectations that come with in-person interaction. You’re not being judged by how you look that day, what you're wearing, or whether you made awkward eye contact. Instead, the focus shifts to who you are, how you express yourself, and how present you are in the conversation. That kind of simplicity often makes it easier to be open, honest, and real.

Many people say they feel more comfortable being vulnerable with someone they’ve never met face-to-face. There’s a certain ease in talking through messages or voice notes—space to think, no rush to respond, no pressure to perform. Over time, trust grows. The small things—sending a meme that made you laugh, checking in after a tough day, remembering tiny details from weeks ago—start to build something solid. It’s not about constant interaction, but consistent care.

Though occasional video chats can add a face to the voice, most virtual friendships don’t rely on constant visual contact. Sometimes it’s a once-a-month call. Sometimes it’s a few messages here and there throughout the day. The format varies, but the emotional presence remains. In fact, many people find that their online friends are the ones who show up most regularly in their lives. These are the people who message just to ask, “You doing okay?” Or who remember the anniversary of something difficult without being reminded.

Of course, there are challenges. Conversations can get lost in translation. Time zones mess with timing. And when someone drifts away, there's no chance of running into them at the grocery store or hearing through a friend what happened. It can feel sudden and unresolved. But these risks aren’t exclusive to virtual friendships—they exist in real life, too. Every relationship comes with a level of uncertainty. That doesn’t make them any less worth investing in.

What truly matters is effort and intention. Are you both showing up? Are you both listening, replying, caring? If the answer is yes, then it’s real. Even if you’ve never shared a meal, sat in the same room, or taken a photo together. The friendship is still valid. It still counts. In some cases, it might even outlast the ones formed by proximity alone.

As the way we connect continues to evolve, so will the way we define closeness. Virtual friendships aren’t about replacing in-person relationships. They’re about expanding what’s possible. They’re a reminder that connection doesn’t need to follow one single path. Whether it starts with a follow, a DM, or a random shared interest in a forum, the result is the same: someone who makes your day better just by being there.

If you’ve got someone like that in your life. Even if you’ve never met face-to-face you’re lucky. And if you haven’t yet, don’t worry. Sometimes, the people who feel most familiar are the ones you haven’t met yet, waiting just a message away.

Virtual friendships have also played a major role in reducing social isolation. For those who live in remote areas, have limited mobility, or simply struggle with social anxiety, digital communication opens doors that once felt closed. It offers connection on your terms—at your pace, in your space. And that kind of accessibility has made meaningful relationships more available than ever before.

At the same time, these friendships often introduce us to people we never would’ve met otherwise. Different backgrounds, different cultures, different ways of thinking—it all adds up to growth. Through these connections, we’re exposed to ideas, experiences, and stories that broaden our understanding of the world. That in itself is a gift.

Most importantly, virtual friendships remind us that connection doesn’t require physical presence. It requires empathy. And in a world that often feels disconnected despite being more connected than ever, a thoughtful message or late-night check-in can carry more weight than any handshake or hug ever could.

items.title: How AI-Powered Semantic Search is Transforming B2B Procurement
items.author: Accio by Alibaba Group
items.content:
For decades, B2B procurement teams have struggled with inefficient supplier discovery processes. Traditional methods relying on manual searches, static vendor databases, and spreadsheet tracking are increasingly inadequate in today's global supply chains. This is where AI-powered semantic search technologies are making a transformative impact.

The Limitations of Traditional Procurement Search Conventional procurement platforms typically require:

Precise keyword matching ("stainless steel pipe ASTM A312")

Manual filtering through hundreds of results

Time-consuming cross-referencing of certifications and capabilities

These friction points create what industry analysts call "the procurement productivity paradox" - teams spend more time managing the process than making strategic decisions.

How Semantic Search Changes the Game Modern AI approaches solve these challenges through three key innovations:

  1. Contextual Query Understanding Unlike keyword search, transformer-based models (like BERT) analyze:

Purchase intent behind queries

Example: A search for "FDA-approved sterile packaging for EU biologics" automatically factors in:

EU medical device regulations

Sterilization method validations

Temperature-controlled logistics requirements

  1. Dynamic Knowledge Graphs Supplier data becomes interconnected through:

Real-time production capacity updates

Certification expirations

Market demand fluctuations

  1. Multilingual Procurement Matching Advanced embedding techniques enable:

Native language search (English, Spanish, German, etc.)

Automatic translation of vendor capabilities

Culture-aware business term matching

Real-World Implementation Results Early adopters combining these techniques report:

40-60% reduction in supplier discovery time

30% improvement in match accuracy

Automated compliance checks reducing manual review by 80%

One notable implementation is Accio, Alibaba's AI procurement solution, which has demonstrated particular success in:

Connecting Asian manufacturers with global buyers

Reducing cross-border transaction friction

Automating export regulation compliance

The Future of AI in Procurement Emerging innovations point to even greater efficiencies:

Predictive supplier scoring using macroeconomic indicators

Autonomous RFQ generation based on purchase patterns

Blockchain-verified production capacity claims

Key Takeaway: AI-powered semantic search isn't just improving procurement - it's redefining how businesses discover and evaluate suppliers in an increasingly complex global marketplace.

items.title: The Unstoppable Benefits of Fitness: Elevate Your Life Today!
items.author: sia Negi
items.content:
Discover the transformative power of fitness! Explore the physical, mental, and emotional benefits that regular exercise unlocks for a healthier, happier you.

fitness, exercise, health, wellness, mental health, physical health, weight loss, strength training, cardio, mood boost, disease prevention, healthy lifestyle

In today's fast-paced world, it's easy to let fitness fall by the wayside. However, prioritizing your physical well-being is an investment that pays dividends in every aspect of your life. From boosting your energy levels to improving your mental clarity, the benefits of fitness are far-reaching and undeniably powerful. This article delves into the multifaceted advantages of incorporating regular exercise into your routine, demonstrating how it can transform your health and overall quality of life. Prepare to be inspired to move!

Unlocking Physical Health: A Foundation for Well-being

The most obvious benefits of fitness are physical. Regular exercise strengthens your cardiovascular system, reducing the risk of heart disease, stroke, and high blood pressure. It helps manage weight by burning calories and building lean muscle mass, which in turn boosts your metabolism. Furthermore, fitness improves bone density, protecting against osteoporosis and fractures, particularly important as we age.

Beyond these key benefits, exercise can also:

  • Regular physical activity can lead to deeper, more restful sleep.
  • Counterintuitively, exercise actually boosts energy levels by improving circulation and oxygen delivery to your cells.
  • Reduce Risk of Chronic Diseases: In addition to cardiovascular disease, fitness helps prevent type 2 diabetes, some cancers, and arthritis.
  • Enhance Physical Appearance: Let's be honest, looking good is a nice bonus! Exercise sculpts your body and improves your overall physique.

Sharpening the Mind: Fitness for Mental Clarity and Emotional Stability

The benefits of fitness extend far beyond the physical realm. Exercise has a profound impact on mental health, acting as a natural antidepressant and anxiety reliever. During physical activity, your brain releases endorphins, which have mood-boosting effects. Regular exercise can also improve cognitive function, enhancing memory, focus, and overall mental clarity.

Here's how fitness positively impacts your mental well-being:

  • Reduces Stress and Anxiety: Exercise helps regulate the body's stress response, lowering cortisol levels and promoting relaxation.
  • Endorphins released during exercise create a sense of euphoria and well-being.
  • Achieving fitness goals, no matter how small, builds confidence and improves self-image.
  • Enhances Cognitive Function: Exercise increases blood flow to the brain, improving memory, focus, and attention span.
  • Regular physical activity can be as effective as medication in treating mild to moderate depression.

Building a Resilient Life: Fitness for Longevity and Quality of Life

Ultimately, the benefits of fitness contribute to a longer, healthier, and more fulfilling life. By preventing chronic diseases, improving physical function, and boosting mental well-being, exercise allows you to live more fully and enjoy your golden years. It also strengthens your resilience, making you better equipped to cope with the challenges life throws your way.

Consider these long-term benefits:

  • Studies show that regular exercise can add years to your life.
  • Improved Quality of Life: Fitness allows you to maintain independence and enjoy activities well into old age.
  • Exercise strengthens your immune system, making you less susceptible to illness.
  • Reduced Risk of Cognitive Decline: Physical activity can help protect against age-related cognitive decline and dementia.
  • Greater Sense of Purpose: Pursuing fitness goals provides a sense of accomplishment and purpose, contributing to overall happiness.

The benefits of fitness are undeniable and transformative. From strengthening your body and sharpening your mind to building a more resilient and fulfilling life, incorporating regular exercise into your routine is one of the best investments you can make in yourself. So, what are you waiting for? Start small, be consistent, and reap the incredible rewards of a fit and healthy lifestyle!

Ready to experience the power of fitness? Start your journey today! Find a workout you enjoy, set realistic goals, and celebrate your progress along the way. Your future self will thank you!
